subcodes.first_line: O thou offshoot of the Tree of Reality! Thou hast been accepted at the court of the true Beloved, admitted at the threshold of the divine Physician
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع شجره حقیقت مقبول بارگاه حبیب حقیقی گشتی و مقرب درگاه طبیب روحانی و مظهر
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc.
